nasb.text: And the eye cannot say to the hand, “I have no need of you”; or again the head to the feet, “I have no need of you.”

esv.text: The eye cannot say to the hand, “I have no need of you,” nor again the head to the feet, “I have no need of you.”

cnv.text: 眼睛不能對手說：“我不需要你。”頭也不能對腳說：“我不需要你們。”

ccb.text: 眼睛不能对手说：“我不需要你。”头也不能对脚说：“我不需要你。”

csbs.text: 所以眼睛不能对手说：“我不需要你！”头也不能对两脚说：“我不需要你们！”
